question: Which team clinched its title first in June 2026 - the NBA champion or the Stanley Cup champion?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
The **New York Knicks** clinched the NBA title first — they won the 2026 NBA Finals on **June 13, 2026**, beating the San Antonio Spurs 4–1 ([NBA.com](https://www.nba.com/news/2026-nba-finals-schedule), [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_NBA_Finals)).

The **Carolina Hurricanes** won the Stanley Cup a day later, on **June 14, 2026**, defeating the Vegas Golden Knights 4–2 in the series ([NHL.com](https://www.nhl.com/hurricanes/news/carolina-hurricanes-win-2026-stanley-cup-final), [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Stanley_Cup_playoffs)).

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
The **NBA champion clinched first**. The **New York Knicks** won the NBA title on **June 13, 2026**, while the **Carolina Hurricanes** secured the Stanley Cup on **June 14**—one day later.

Sources: [NBA](https://www.nba.com/news/2026-nba-finals-schedule) · [NHL](https://www.nhl.com/news/2026-stanley-cup-final-schedule-television-results)
